summary: BOTH NEW FEATURES VERIFIED: 1) Account Setup Email - Invite new participant by email with auto-generated credentials works correctly. 2) Password Reset functionality works correctly. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend E2E tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test users created with 'TEST_', 'test_', 'e2e_', 'invite_test_' prefixes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new features (Account Setup Email and Password Reset) are fully functional. The register endpoint accepts meeting_id parameter to trigger account setup email. The password reset endpoint at POST /api/auth/reset-password generates new secure passwords and sends them via email. Email system is LIVE (not mocked).

feature_1_account_setup_email.description: When inviting new participant, auto-generate credentials and send account setup email

ui_verification.credential_notice: An account will be created and login credentials will be emailed to the invited person.

email_logs_sample: 2026-03-03 23:00:46 - Sent account setup email to invite_test_1772578844@hospital.com

feature_2_password_reset.description: Password reset functionality where users can enter email and receive new auto-generated password

ui_verification.security_notice: For security reasons, we don't disclose whether an email exists in our system

feature_2_password_reset.success_message: Success! If an account with that email exists, a new password has been sent to your email address.

secure_password_generation.description: Passwords auto-generated with 12 characters including lowercase, uppercase, numbers, and special chars

confirmed_sent_emails: account_setup emails to test_doctor_*, test_nurse_*, test_organizer_*, test_guest_* users
password_reset emails to test_reset_*, e2e_password_reset_* users
